summary: Security hardening validation complete. All 21 backend tests passed. Security headers, password validation, email validation, rate-limiting, and admin endpoint protection all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/health returns 200 with status=ok
Security headers present: X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, Referrer-Policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy=geolocation=(), microphone=(), camera=()
POST /api/auth/login with admin@wavewatch.com / WaveWatch2026! returns user+token with is_admin=true
POST /api/auth/register rejects password <8 chars with HTTP 400
POST /api/auth/register rejects password without uppercase with HTTP 400
POST /api/auth/register rejects password without digit with HTTP 400
POST /api/auth/register rejects invalid email format with HTTP 422
POST /api/auth/register rejects email without domain with HTTP 422
POST /api/auth/register accepts valid {username, email, password >=8 chars with uppercase+digit}
Rate-limit on /api/auth/register: 5/hour per IP - returns HTTP 429 after limit reached
Rate-limit on /api/auth/login: 5 bad attempts per IP:email - returns HTTP 429 after limit reached
GET /api/auth/me with Bearer token works
POST /api/user/favorites (auth) toggles favorite correctly
GET /api/playlists (auth) works
GET /api/admin/stats with admin token returns stats
GET /api/admin/stats without auth returns 401
GET /api/admin/stats with non-admin user returns 403
GET /api/tmdb/trending/movies returns data
CORS headers present: Access-Control-Allow-Origin, Access-Control-Allow-Methods, Access-Control-Allow-Headers
Security headers present on auth endpoints
Security headers present on TMDB endpoints
critical_code_review_comments: Rate-limiting works correctly but in load-balanced environments, requests may come from different internal IPs, splitting the rate limit count. This is expected behavior but worth noting for production monitoring.
seed_data_creation: Test users created during registration tests (prefixed with TEST_)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Security hardening validation complete. All security features working: SecurityHeadersMiddleware adds X-Frame-Options=DENY, X-Content-Type-Options=nosniff, Referrer-Policy=strict-origin-when-cross-origin, Permissions-Policy. Password validation requires min 8 chars, 1 uppercase, 1 digit. EmailStr validation on register/login. Rate-limits: 5 registrations/hour per IP, 5 bad logins per IP:email pair with 15-min lockout. Admin endpoints protected with 401/403. CORS configured for FRONTEND_URL.

security_features_validated.email_validation: EmailStr (Pydantic) - rejects invalid formats with HTTP 422
